## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have removed any console.logs and debugging code

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested the changes in a local environment

### Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG (if applicable)
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments for new functions/components

### Dependencies

- [ ] I have checked that no new dependencies were added unnecessarily
- [ ] If dependencies were added, I have justified their use in the PR description

### Breaking Changes

- [ ] This PR introduces no breaking changes
- [ ] OR: I have documented all breaking changes in the PR description
- [ ] OR: I have created a migration guide for breaking changes
